title: Santa's Decor
description: A mod that adds decorative blocks using mob drops and other resources. Dyes are for chumps.
body:
Santa's Decor is a mod that adds new colors of the blocks we all know and love (bricks, chiseled bricks, smooth stone, cobblestone, quartz, chiseled quartz, planks, logs, quartz pillars, and glass). These colors are based off mob drops and other resources, but no dyes. Colors are typically called "families".

Please see the wiki for additional, up to date information.
